course_name: Diploma of Foundation Studies (Health and Life Sciences)

course_advantages.title: High Articulation Rate
course_advantages.description: More than 90% students adopt further study.

course_advantages.title: Articulation to an Overseas University
course_advantages.description: Graduates may apply for admission to the first year entry into releated Degree programmes at Plymouth University.

detailed_information.description: The programme aims to deliver a quality education, with vocational and generic elements, that will enable students to achieve both the basic skills required for developing a career in the industry, and a sound academic foundation for further studies. The programme focuses heavily on communication, in particular English, Chinese with Putonghua and Information Technology, as these areas are particularly important in the workplace. Emphasis is also placed on the development of interpersonal skills and teamwork, and a student-centred approach.

basic_grid_data.Offering Campus(es) / Venue(s): IVE (Chai Wan / Kwai Chung / Sha Tin)
basic_grid_data.Study Places: IVE (Chai Wan) - 80 | IVE (Kwai Chung) - 200 | IVE (Sha Tin) - 220

basic_info_remarks: Students may be required to attend classes on other VTC campuses. VTC reserves the right to cancel any programme, revise programme title, content or change the offering institute(s) / campus(es) / class venue(s) if circumstances so warrant.
admission_requirements: Completion of Secondary 6 (under the New Senior Secondary Academic Structure); OR
Equivalent

further_education_and_career.Articulation: Graduates of Diploma of Foundation Studies are eligible to apply for VTC’s Higher Diploma programmes, which normally require five HKDSE subjects at Level 2 or above, including Chinese Language and English Language.Graduates of Diploma of Foundation Studies - Health and Life Sciences may apply for admission to the first year entry into Degree programmes from School of Geography, Earth and Environmental Sciences and School of Biological and Marine Sciences at Plymouth University.
further_education_and_career.Career Prospects: The programme equips students with skills required for employment in the health and life sciences’ sectors and also prepares them for further studies.

course_modules: Vocational Chinese: Discussion and Social Correspondence
Vocational Chinese: Reading Comprehension & Administrative Text Writing
course_content_remarks: Diploma of Foundation Studies students may also consider taking the optional module 'Foundation Mathematics III' for the eligibility to apply for VTC's Higher Diploma programmes or related civil service jobs which require Level 2 or above in HKDSE Mathematics as one of their entrance requirements. Separate tuition fee will be charged for this optional module.
tuition_remarks: The study duration of Diploma of Foundation Studies programmes is normally 1 year. The tuition fee is payable in two installments. Each installment is HK$11,410.
In addition to tuition fees, students will be required to pay other fees, such as caution money and students’ union annual fees.

Some students may be required to study bridging modules or enhancement programmes to support their study; or to attend additional training, industrial attachments, public examinations for which separate fees will be charged.
Students of Diploma of Foundation Studies programmes may choose to take the optional module “Foundation Mathematics III” with a separate tuition fee.
Tuition fees are subject to annual review.
The information listed above is only applicable tolocal students.

student_sharings.title: School Laboratory Technician, Sai Kung Sung Tsun Catholic School (Secondary Section)
student_sharings.sharing_content: In the foundational diploma programme, I studied biology, chemistry, and laboratory techniques. This knowledge helped me better transition to the higher diploma programme and sparked my interest in these fields. Additionally, these programmes laid a solid foundation for my further studies to become a laboratory technician, equipping me with the necessary fundamental skills. This learning experience not only enhanced my professional knowledge but also boosted my confidence in working in a laboratory setting.

student_sharings.title: Research Assistant, The University of Hong Kong
student_sharings.sharing_content: The DFS programme equipped me with the necessary fundamental knowledge and basic techniques in various curriculums, including biology and chemistry. Moreover, the HD programme brought me to a higher level with more professional academic training and laboratory skills in microbiology, molecular biology, biochemistry and cell culture.

course_advantages.title: Equivalent to DSE Level 2 in Five Subjects
course_advantages.description: Accepted by Civil Service Bureau as meeting entry requirements of grades in civil service which requires HKDSE Level 2 in five subjects including Chinese and English.

course_advantages.title: Diverse Articulation Pathways
course_advantages.description: Graduates are eligible to apply for VTC's Higher Diploma programmes of all Disciplines.

course_advantages.title: Updated and Practical Business Knowledge
course_advantages.description: The programme equips students with up-to-date business knowledge that establish a solid groundwork for their future career growth.

detailed_information.description: The programme aims to deliver a quality education, with vocational and generic elements, that will enable students to achieve both the basic skills required for developing a career in various business fields, and a sound academic foundation for further studies. The programme focuses heavily on communication, in particular English, Chinese with Putonghua and Information Technology, as these areas are particularly important in the workplace. Emphasis is also placed on the development of interpersonal skills and teamwork, and a student-centred approach.

student_sharings.title: Director, Consultation and Solution Hatcher Group Limited (a company listed on the Hong Kong Exchange)
student_sharings.sharing_content: The programmes of IVE are very useful to my career development. Foundation Diploma programmes helped me strengthen the language proficiency and arouse my interest in business studies. It also inspires me to choose accountancy as my lifelong profession. I was then articulated to Diploma/ Higher Diploma in Accountancy and Information Systems and was taught by wonderful lecturers. I am now a professional accountant and am greatly indebted to them for their teaching.

student_sharings.title: Senior Asset Manager, H Properties
student_sharings.sharing_content: My learning experience at IVE was amazing and filled with opportunities. Both my classmates and I had numerous chances to acquire hands-on experience, collaborate on group projects, and participate in various interesting activities. After graduating, I was admitted to the City University of Hong Kong to pursue my bachelor's and master's degrees. Currently, I hold the position of a senior asset manager for the family property investment portfolios. I am grateful that I discovered my career path at IVE.

student_sharings.title: Founder of a Pet Food Online Store
student_sharings.sharing_content: After the public examination, I chose to enroll in the IVE’s Diploma of Foundation Studies to establish a solid foundation in business field, preparing myself for the future goal of starting my own company. After completing the one-year programme, I progressed to Higher Diploma and then articulated to Bachelor’s Degree. After graduation, I applied the knowledge I gained to realise my entrepreneurial dreams.

course_advantages.title: Continuous Learning Assessment
course_advantages.description: Project-based learning for effective and effortless knowledge acquisition.

course_advantages.title: Stay Aligned with Industry Needs
course_advantages.description: Learn the latest applications to enhance industry competitiveness, foster comprehensive student growth.

course_advantages.title: Communication Skills
course_advantages.description: Strengthen communication and presentation skills, fully preparing for further education and career.

detailed_information.description: The programme aims to provide students with design fundamentals, language and generic skills for further studies. Through a "think and do" interactive approach, the design modules emphasise the conceptual and practical skills, design technology, the creative process, and the key aspects of the design industry. Students also learn presentation, communication and interpersonal skills necessary for the study of design.

student_sharings.title: Art Director, Sunny Idea (HK) Limited, DDB Group Hong Kong
student_sharings.sharing_content: DFS (Design) provide me with a lot of professional design knowledge and skills for my further study and career development. Thanks to the programme for helping me find a career direction! After graduation, I'm employed by an advertising agency to stimulate target audiences with innovative designs.

student_sharings.title: Architectural Assistant, Ronald Lu & Partners (RLP Asia)
student_sharings.sharing_content: By taking the Diploma of Foundation Studies (Design) programme, I learned basic design software and theory. Moreover, how to embrace the design process, thereby establishing my career prospects.

student_sharings.title: Product Manager, Jewelry Company
student_sharings.sharing_content: The IVE Diploma of Foundation Studies allowed me to explore various design disciplines and build a strong language foundation. I then progressed to Higher Diploma and Bachelor’s Degree. After graduation, I worked in accessory design and graphic design, applying my knowledge into practice.

student_sharings.title: Assistant Building Services Engineer, Gammon Construction Limited
student_sharings.sharing_content: I began with IVE's Diploma of Foundation Studies, advanced to a Higher Diploma, and later earned a Bachelor's Degree at THEi. During my studies, an internship with an engineering consultancyprovided me with valuable industry insights and practice for paving my way to a professional engineer.

student_sharings.title: Graduate Trainee, CLP Holdings Limited
student_sharings.sharing_content: Studying the Diploma of Foundation Studies (Engineering) equipped me with electrical engineering knowledge, and it also strengthened my language foundation and improved my English level significantly. Nevertheless, the programme emphasises whole-person development, I actively participated in VCare as a volunteer. The fruitful campus life ignited my enthusiasm for learning. IVE Engineering provided good atmosphere and environment for students to strive their studies with practical examples during lectures. All of these helped me to complete my higher diploma and bachelor’s degree, as well as facilitated my current job in power company.

student_sharings.title: Graduate, Diploma of Foundation Studies (Engineering), IVE
student_sharings.sharing_content: I began with IVE's Diploma of Foundation Studies, advanced to a Higher Diploma, and later was admitted to Year 3 of a Bachelor's Degree at PolyU. During my studies, I have been awarded with a number of Scholarships paving my way to a professional engineer.

student_sharings.title: Graduate Engineer Trainee, Multinational Engineering Company
student_sharings.sharing_content: The Diploma of Foundation Studies covered various engineering disciplines, helping me identify my interests and strengthen my language skills. After graduation, I progressed to the Higher Diploma in Building Services Engineering at IVE and then smoothly transitioned to a Bachelor’s Degree, fully equipping myself to become an engineer.

student_sharings.title: Engineer, Multinational Engineering Firm
student_sharings.sharing_content: The Diploma of Foundation Studies allowed me to explore engineering knowledge. I was awarded a scholarship for an overseas exchange, which broadened my horizons. After graduation, I advanced to Higher Diploma and then smoothly transitioned to Bachelor’s Degree, laying a solid foundation for my career development.

student_sharings.title: Director of Housekeeping, Regal Riverside Hotel
student_sharings.sharing_content: DFS provided me a solid academic foundation for articulating to Higher Diploma and Degree programmes. Besides, the programme contents are practical and interesting that helped me to find my career direction in the early stage of my study.

student_sharings.title: Graduate, Diploma of Foundation Studies (Retail), IVE (Renamed as Diploma of Foundation Studies (Retail and E-Commerce))
student_sharings.sharing_content: The programme equipped me with essential knowledge and skills in retail operations, customer service, and retail technology applications, while also improving my English foundation. This preparation allowed me to smoothly progress to a Higher Diploma and eventually a Bachelor's Degree at City University of Hong Kong, paving the way for my future career.

student_sharings.title: Graduate, Diploma of Foundation Studies (Retail and E-Commerce), IVE
student_sharings.sharing_content: This programme has helped me gain practical skills and understand how the retail and e-commerce industry works, including market trends and business strategies. It's preparing me for future jobs or starting my own business in this field, and I feel ready to excel in it.

course_advantages.title: Authentic Service-learning Experience

course_advantages.title: Through-train Articulation Pathway

student_sharings.title: Graduate, Diploma of Foundation Studies (Community Services), IVE
student_sharings.sharing_content: Through the Diploma of Foundation Studies (Community Services), I have gained insights in my future goals and pursuits. Studying this programme became the cornerstone of my decision to pursue further studies. At the same time, through community practice and learning, I discovered my interest and potential in human-centered services. After completing the programme, I successfully advanced to the Higher Diploma in Special Child Care and Inclusive Education through VTC's well-designed progression pathway, which allowed me to gain more knowledge and skills related to special education and to serve society upon graduation.

student_sharings.title: Graduate, Diploma of Foundation Studies (Community Services)
student_sharings.sharing_content: I started my journey in the Diploma of Foundation Studies (Community Services) and progressed to the Higher Diploma in Social Work, from which I have been equipped with professional knowledge, communication and social skills, cum relevant service learning oppotunities. Such experiences have strengthened my career commitment to move forward to become a professional social worker in serving the community.

student_sharings.title: Full-time student of Master of Social Work
student_sharings.sharing_content: The Diploma of Foundation Studies allowed me to engage with various social welfare organisations and kindergartens, helping me find my career direction. The programme is equivalent to five Level 2 subjects in the DSE, enabling me to register for professional qualifications after completing my Higher Diploma and progress to Bachelor’s Degree. Thus, I began my career in special early childhood education.

student_sharings.title: Deputy Manager at a Hostel for a non-profit organization
student_sharings.sharing_content: The Diploma of Foundation Studies helped me solidify my aspiration to pursue a career in social work and laid a strong academic and professional foundation. This enabled me to progress to higher qualifications. After graduation, I became a social worker dedicated to serving the community.

course_advantages.title: IT Professional Skills
course_advantages.description: The programme covers the necessary IT and generic skills.

course_advantages.title: Career Development in IT Industry
course_advantages.description: The programme enables students to develop a career in the IT industry for further studies or employment.

detailed_information.description: The programme aims to deliver a quality education that will enable students to achieve the professional skills required for developing a career in the IT industry, and a solid foundation for further studies. The programme develops students’ both verbal and written language ability and enhances their communication and presentation skills, so as to enable them to pursue a successful career in the IT industry. Emphasis is also placed on the development of interpersonal skills and teamwork, and help students to become self-directed lifelong learners.

Students of Diploma of Foundation Studies programmes may choose to take the optional module “Foundation Mathematics III” with a separate tuition fee.
Tuition fees are subject to annual review.
The information listed above is only applicable tolocal students.

student_sharings.title: Stem Tutor, Coding101
student_sharings.sharing_content: The programme equipped me with essential knowledge and skills in programming, networking and game development, while also improving my English communication skills. From studying for DFS to Higher Diploma, I can apply the skills I have learned to create software programs to solve the issues, providing more convenience for life and benefiting the people.

student_sharings.title: Senior Frontend Engineer , Multinational E-commerce Company (Embassy in Canada)
student_sharings.sharing_content: The diverse learning experiences and interactive teaching modes of the VTC Diploma of Foundation Studies reignited my interest in learning. This enabled me to progress to Higher Diploma and then Bachelor’s Degree. The knowledge I gained in system development and cloud computing during my studies has also made my current work more efficient.

student_sharings.title: Founder of a Technology Start-up
student_sharings.sharing_content: The Diploma of Foundation Studies programme covers skills such as web design and programming, laying a strong foundation of professional knowledge for progressing to Higher Diploma. After completing the Higher Diploma, I successfully moved on to Bachelor’s Degree, getting closer to my professional aspirations.

student_sharings.title: Cloud Engineer , Innovation and Technology  Company
student_sharings.sharing_content: While studying the VTC Diploma of Foundation Studies, I explored topics such as computer network design, cloud application development, and virtualisation system management. This laid a solid foundation for me to progress to the VTC Higher Diploma and obtain internationally recognised cloud certifications, equipping myself to achieve my professional goals.

course_name: Diploma of Foundation Studies (Film and Animation Design)

course_advantages.title: Continuous Learning Assessment
course_advantages.description: Project-based learning for effective and effortless mastery of storytelling in film and animation.

course_advantages.title: Stay Aligned with Industry Needs
course_advantages.description: Learn the latest production techniques and tools to enhance competitiveness in the film and animation industry.

course_advantages.title: Storytelling Skills
course_advantages.description: Strengthening storytelling and visual narrative abilities, fully preparing for further education and careers, helping students stand out in the creative industry.

detailed_information.description: This programme focuses on training students in professional knowledge, language skills, and generic skills in film and animation production, laying a solid foundation for further studies. It adopts an interactive "think and do" approach, combining theory and practice to teach fundamental techniques and skills in animation and film production while fostering students' creativity and professional knowledge. The programme aims to provide a solid foundation in animation and film production, enabling students to pursue further studies while enhancing their understanding of the industry, including market trends and career pathways. It also cultivates students' ability to collaborate in a team environment and emphasizes project management, encouraging students to develop their individual creativity and effectively express it in film and animation projects.
basic_info_remarks: Students may be required to attend classes on other VTC campuses. VTC reserves the right to cancel any programme, revise programme title, content or change the offering institute(s) / campus(es) / class venue(s) if circumstances so warrant.

further_education_and_career.Career Prospects: The programme equips students with the skills and knowledge necessary to enhance their employability in the animation and film production industry while also providing a solid foundation for further studies.

course_name: Diploma of Foundation Studies (Digital Media Studies)

course_advantages.title: Digital Media Knowledge and Professional Skills
course_advantages.description: The programme equips students with essential digital media knowledge and skills.

course_advantages.title: Career Development in Digital Media Industry
course_advantages.description: The programme enables students to develop a career in the digital media industry for further studies or employment.

detailed_information.description: The programme aims to provide students with a foundation knowledge and skills in Digital Media which is major sub-area of Information Technology. It equips students the ability to evaluate and analyse digital media content, understand digital rights and responsibilities, and cope with challenges posed by emerging technologies in order to enable them to pursue further studies and contribute to the Innovation and Technology industry's workforce needs. Emphasis is also placed on the development of interpersonal skills and teamwork, and help students to become self-directed lifelong learners.

course_name: Diploma of Foundation Studies (Intelligent Mobility Technology)

course_advantages.title: Pathway to Higher Education
course_advantages.description: Designed to facilitate smooth articulation to Higher Diploma programmes of VTC, with opportunities for credit exemptions.

course_advantages.title: State-of-the-art Facilities
course_advantages.description: Access to cutting-edge facilities, such as the Aviation, Maritime, and EV Training centers, provides hands-on, practical learning experiences. Students can also participate in exchange activities and site visits for vibrant learning experiences.

course_advantages.title: New Transport’s Emerging Technologies
course_advantages.description: Covering key areas such as Low Altitude Economy (LAE) related aviation technology, Electric Vehicles (EV), Hydrogen-fuel Power, Robotics and Automation, preparing students for future technological advancements.

detailed_information.description: This programme aims to provide high-quality education by integrating intelligent mobility technology with foundational academic training, enhancing students' employability and readiness for further studies. The specialized stream focuses on emerging mobility systems, covering low-altitude economy, new energy, robotics, and automation. It equips students with core scientific and technological principles such as mathematics, physics, and engineering fundamentals, while cultivating technical application skills, analytical and critical thinking, problem-solving abilities, and effective communication and collaboration in multidisciplinary environments.
basic_info_remarks: Students may be required to attend classes on other VTC campuses. VTC reserves the right to cancel any programme, revise programme title, content or change the offering institute(s) / campus(es) / class venue(s) if circumstances so warrant.

further_education_and_career.Career Prospects: The programme equips students with skills required for employment in the Intelligent Mobility industries and also prepares them for further studies. The emerging intelligent mobility industries are developing rapidly and include, but are not limited to low-altitude economy industries, new energy system and applications, robotics and digital technologies, etc.

detailed_information.description: The programme aims to deliver a quality education, with vocational and generic elements, that will enable students to achieve both the basic skills required for developing a career in the industry, and a sound academic foundation for further studies. The programme focuses heavily on communication, in particular English, Chinese with Putonghua and Information Technology, as these areas are particularly important in the workplace. Emphasis is also placed on the development of interpersonal skills and teamwork, and a student-centred approach.
